# Generated by Veld

> ⚠️ **DO NOT EDIT** — this entire directory is auto-generated by `veld generate`.
> Any manual changes will be overwritten on the next run.

## Structure

| Path | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `types/types.ts` | All TypeScript interfaces and enum types |
| `interfaces/` | Service contracts (one per module) |
| `routes/` | Route registration functions with validation |
| `schemas/schemas.ts` | Zod validation schemas |
| `client/api.ts` | Frontend SDK (fetch-based, zero dependencies) |
| `index.ts` | Barrel export for clean imports |
| `package.json` | Package alias (`@veld/generated`) |

## Modules

- **Users** — User management and lookup (6 actions)
- **Auth** — Authentication and session management (4 actions)

## Import Alias

Add to your `tsconfig.json`:

```json
{
  "compilerOptions": {
    "paths": {
      "@veld/*": ["./generated/*"]
    }
  }
}
```

Then import:
```typescript
import type { User } from '@veld/types/types';
import { api } from '@veld/client/api';
```

## Regenerate

```bash
veld generate
```
